scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @crm/types && npm run build --workspace @crm/config && npm run build --workspace @crm/ui && npm run build --workspace @crm/auth && npm run build --workspace @crm/ai && npm run build --workspace @crm/database
scripts.build:web-deps: npm run build --workspace @crm/types && npm run build --workspace @crm/config && npm run build --workspace @crm/ui && npm run build --workspace @crm/auth && npm run build --workspace @crm/ai
scripts.build:api-deps: npm run build --workspace @crm/types && npm run build --workspace @crm/config && npm run build --workspace @crm/database
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @crm/web" "npm run dev --workspace @crm/api"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:web-deps && npm run dev --workspace @crm/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:api-deps && npm run dev --workspace @crm/api
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @crm/web && npm run build --workspace @crm/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/types && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/config && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/auth && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/ai && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/database && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @crm/api
